domain: Tlingit potlatch (Pacific NW gift-giving feast; rival chiefs escalate gift-destruction; second-price auction title-transfer; victor shows indifference to wealth)
specific_mechanism: Alternating proposer-defender coevolution with second-price title-transfer; K-consecutive-surpass condition; Red Queen escalation arms race.
llm_application: POTLATCH-COEVOL: two LLM agents alternate as PROPOSER (attacker) and DEFENDER. Each round: Proposer generates a harder rule-violating prompt (gift escalation); Defender produces a more refined refusal (counter-gift). A judge scores both via a SECOND-PRICE metric (judge declares winner only if delta-quality > runner-up's gain). Title (best-of-N champion-status) transfers when one agent surpasses the other for K consecutive rounds. Differs from KOMI-WARD (boundary defender only), Multi-Agent Evolve (Proposer+Solver+Judge static), Digital Red Queen (program-evolution not LLM dialog), Attack-Defense Co-Evolution (no title-transfer K-consecutive rule) by combining (a) ALTERNATING role swap, (b) SECOND-PRICE judge metric, (c) K-CONSECUTIVE title-transfer rule.
novelty_claim: Multi-Agent Evolve + Digital Red Queen + Attack-Defense Co-Evolution + CoEvolve already cover adversarial coevolution. POTLATCH-COEVOL recombines alternating + second-price + K-consecutive. Small extension.
